title: Podplane OIDC config
description: Configuration for an Easy OIDC server deployment managed by Podplane.

$schema.description: Path or URL to the JSON Schema for editor validation and completion. Podplane writes a local relative path so config editing works offline.

hostname.description: Hostname for the OIDC issuer. Podplane serves the issuer at https://<hostname>.

signing_key_secret_arn.description: AWS Secrets Manager ARN containing the OIDC signing key.

default_redirect_uris.description: Default redirect URIs applied to clients that do not specify their own redirect_uris.

clients.description: OIDC client definitions keyed by client name.

groups_overrides.description: Static group mappings keyed by override name. Clients reference these by groups_override.

kind.description: Cloud provider used to deploy Easy OIDC. Podplane currently supports aws.

account.description: Provider account identifier, such as an AWS account ID.

zone.description: DNS zone for the OIDC hostname.

kind.description: DNS provider used for managed OIDC DNS records. Podplane currently supports aws.

hosted_zone_id.description: Provider-specific hosted zone ID. For AWS, this is the Route 53 hosted zone ID.

kind.description: Upstream OAuth connector used by Easy OIDC.

client_secret_arn.description: AWS Secrets Manager ARN containing the upstream OAuth client ID and client secret.

groups_override.description: Name of a groups_overrides entry to apply to this client.

redirect_uris.description: Redirect URIs allowed for this client. Overrides default_redirect_uris when set.

groupsOverride.description: Mapping from user email or subject to static group names.
